response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scene mapping: Identified two songs performed by VTuber Yukisaki Riona: 'Tsumi to Batsu' (00:00-02:18) and 'Ashura-chan' (02:19-05:05). 2. Metadata: 'Tsumi to Batsu' by Shiina Ringo (lyrics lookup); 'Ashura-chan' composed by Neru (lyrics lookup). 3. Lyrics retrieval: Used search tool to find full original lyrics for both. 4. Construction of JSON following strict schema.
response.global_summary: A video of a VTuber named Yukisaki Riona performing two vocal songs: 'Tsumi to Batsu' by Shiina Ringo and 'Ashura-chan' composed by Neru. The video captures her dancing and singing on stage.

scenes.description: The performer, Yukisaki Riona, performs the song 'Tsumi to Batsu'. The scene features her dancing on a stage with a red neon background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
頬を刺す朝の山手通り
烟草の空き箱を捨てる
今日もまた足の踏み場は無い
小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
「不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
未来等見ないで
確信出来る現在だけ重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って
必要なのは是だけ認めて」
愛してる独り泣き喚いて
夜道を弄れど虚しい
改札の安蛍光灯は
貴方の影すら落さない
歪んだ無常の遠き日も
セヴンスターの香り
味わう如く季節を呼び起こす
あたしが望んだこと自体
矛盾を優に超えて
一番愛しいあなたの声迄
掠れさせて居たのだろう
静寂を破るドイツ車とパトカー
サイレン 爆音 現実界 或る浮遊
確信出来る 現在だけ 重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って
必要なのは是だけ認めて
「不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
未来等見ないで
確信出来る現在だけ重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って
必要なのは是だけ認めて」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The morning Yamate Street that stabs my cheeks
Throwing away an empty cigarette box
Again today there is no room for my feet
A small room indulges in solitude
"Don't love the restless screams
Don't look at the future or anything
Layer only the present I can be certain of
Call my name properly
Touch my body
Recognize only this as necessary"
I love you, crying and screaming alone
It's empty even if I fool around on the night road
The cheap fluorescent light of the ticket gate
Doesn't even cast your shadow
Even those distant days of distorted impermanence
Like tasting the scent of Seven Stars
Calling up the season
The very thing I wished for
Easily exceeding contradictions
Even your voice that I love the most
Must have been rasped away
A German car and patrol car breaking the silence
Siren, roar, reality, a certain levitation
Layer only the present I can be certain of
Call my name properly
Touch my body
Recognize only this as necessary
"Don't love the restless screams
Don't look at the future or anything
Layer only the present I can be certain of
Call my name properly
Touch my body
Recognize only this as necessary"

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Someone is absorbed in the world in their hands
Learning how to keep a monster
Selling their tongue if it means being chosen
Digging a grave only as much as they've been betrayed
Their foolish head does something
And it all turns into chilling words
If I could say bye-bye to faces I don't remember
I could even become an Ashura
Running, escape escape escape, as Buddha is
Flying, step step step, as ordered
Understand, understand
Even devouring Enma the King of Hell
Sneak sneak sneak, in the storm
Skip skip skip, oh well, piece of cake
Understand, understand
Just go ahead and suck until the marrow of the bone
Burning the滲み of the day on trees and warming each other
The limbs of him who slandered duty are scattered
崇める the meaning as aesthetic consciousness without even knowing
It was good enough for the pseudo-bait-like selfishness
I acted cute with a fake face for the full course of pleasant gossip
If I have to dance with a stupid monk
I'll hold hands with the devil instead
Running, escape escape escape, as Buddha is
Flying, step step step, as ordered
Understand, understand
Even devouring Enma the King of Hell
Sneak sneak sneak, in the storm
Skip skip skip
You speak your sleep-talking in the next world
Running, escape escape escape, as Buddha is
Flying, step step step, as ordered
Understand, understand
Even devouring Enma the King of Hell
Sneak sneak sneak, in the storm
Skip skip skip
Just go ahead and suck until the marrow of the bone
Hey, just keep yelling and yelling
Don't bow your head
